description_it: Migliora le tue competenze di livello B1 con frasi complete ed esempi d'uso quotidiano.

exercises.prompt_it: Traduci l'intera frase in inglese: "Vivo qui dal 2010."
exercises.correct_answer: I have lived here since 2010.

exercises.prompt_en: L'italiano è: Mi ha detto che era stanca.. Completa la frase in inglese: She ___ me that she was tired.
exercises.correct_answer: told
options: told
said
spoke
talked

exercises.prompt_it: Qual è la traduzione esatta per: "L'ambiente ha bisogno di essere protetto."?
options: The society needs to be protected.
The technology needs to be protected.
The environment needs to be protected.
The economy needs to be protected.
exercises.correct_answer: The environment needs to be protected.
exercises.explanation_it: L'unica forma corretta e naturale è: "The environment needs to be protected.".

exercises.prompt_it: Traduci l'intera frase in inglese: "Non devi per forza indossare la cravatta."
exercises.correct_answer: You don't have to wear a tie.

exercises.prompt_en: L'italiano è: Sono abituato ad alzarmi presto.. Completa la frase in inglese: I am used to ___ up early.
exercises.correct_answer: getting
options: get
getting
got
to get

exercises.prompt_it: Qual è la traduzione esatta per: "È riuscito a superare l'esame."?
options: He managed to pass the exam.
He could to pass the exam.
He can to pass the exam.
He succeeded to pass the exam.
exercises.correct_answer: He managed to pass the exam.
exercises.explanation_it: L'unica forma corretta e naturale è: "He managed to pass the exam.".

exercises.prompt_it: Traduci l'intera frase in inglese: "Vorrei avere più tempo libero."
exercises.correct_answer: I wish I had more free time.

exercises.prompt_en: L'italiano è: Se piove, resteremo a casa.. Completa la frase in inglese: If it ___, we will stay at home.
exercises.correct_answer: rains
options: rains
rain
rained
will rain

exercises.prompt_it: Trascrivi esattamente la frase in inglese che hai sentito.
options: I have lived here from 2010.
I have lived here for 2010.
I have lived here since 2010.
exercises.correct_answer: I have lived here since 2010.

exercises.audio_text: She told me that she was tired.
exercises.prompt_it: Trascrivi esattamente la frase in inglese che hai sentito.
options: She told me that she was tired.
She spoke me that she was tired.
She said me that she was tired.
exercises.correct_answer: She told me that she was tired.

exercises.audio_text: If it rains, we will stay at home.

options: If it rains, we will stay at home.
If it rain, we will stay at home.
If it rained, we will stay at home.
exercises.correct_answer: If it rains, we will stay at home.
